task: I need to message a teacher about a grade that looks off on one of my assignments, and I want to make sure I explain it clearly. Can you help me draft a short note that sounds respectful and gets the point across?

turns.agent_response:
Absolutely — here’s a short, respectful version:

**Hi [Teacher’s Name], I noticed my grade on [assignment name] seems a little off, and I wanted to check if there might have been a mistake. Could you take a look when you have a chance? Thank you.**

If you want, I can also make it:
- a little more casual
- a little more formal
- or shorter, like a text-style message

user_simulator.text: Yeah, that works. Short and respectful, and it gets the point across without sounding rude. I don’t need the extra versions right now.
